## butler-web status

Print the status.

### Synopsis

Print Butler component status information, exit non-zero on any error.

```
butler-web status [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help                           help for status
      --status.http.host-port string   The host:port (e.g. 127.0.0.1:3000 or :3000) for the health check (default ":3000")
```

* [butler-web](butler-web.md)	 - butler web is the main http server for butler
